name: IdsEdwMktngTerrDExtr

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ABC_TMP_IdsEdwMktngTerrDExtr; WITH MKTNG_TERR_Joined AS (SELECT TERR.MKTNG_TERR_SK, COALESCE(SYSCD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, TERR.MKTNG_TERR_ID, CATCD.TRGT_CD AS MKTING_TERR_CAT_CD, TERR.ACCT_CRDNTR_NM AS MKTING_TERR_ACCT_CRDNTR_NM, TERR.ACCT_EXEC_NM AS MKTING_TERR_ACCT_EXEC_NM, CATCD.TRGT_CD_NM AS MKTING_TERR_CAT_NM, TERR.CRT_DT_SK AS MKTING_TERR_CRT_DT_SK, TERR.MKTNG_TERR_DESC, TERR.EFF_DT_SK AS MKTING_TERR_EFF_DT_SK, TERR.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK AS MKTING_TERR_LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, TERR.REP_NM AS MKTING_TERR_REP_NM, TERR.TERM_DT_SK AS MKTING_TERR_TERM_DT_SK, TERR.MKTNG_TERR_UNIQ_KEY, TERR.MKTNG_TERR_CAT_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MKTNG_TERR TERR LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG SYSCD ON TERR.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = SYSCD.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CATCD ON TERR.MKTNG_TERR_CAT_CD_SK = CATCD.CD_MPPNG_SK ) SELECT MKTNG_TERR_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MKTNG_TERR_ID, MKTING_TERR_CAT_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, MKTING_TERR_ACCT_CRDNTR_NM, MKTING_TERR_ACCT_EXEC_NM, MKTING_TERR_CAT_NM, MKTING_TERR_CRT_DT_SK, MKTNG_TERR_DESC, MKTING_TERR_EFF_DT_SK, MKTING_TERR_LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, MKTING_TERR_REP_NM, MKTING_TERR_TERM_DT_SK, MKTNG_TERR_UNIQ_KEY, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MKTNG_TERR_CAT_CD_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ABC_TMP_IdsEdwMktngTerrDExtr FROM MKTNG_TERR_Joined

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2006 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     EdwAgntTerrExtr

DESCRIPTION:  
  Pulls data from ids and loads to edw  
      

INPUTS:
	IDS - TERR
  
HASH FILES:
                hf_cdma_codes         - CDMA code table - resolve code lookups
               

TRANSFORMS:  
                  TRIM all the fields that are extracted or used in lookups
                           
PROCESSING:
                  IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes
                
  

OUTPUTS: 
                   TERR_D.dat

MODIFICATIONS:
              Sharon Andrew  08/12/2006    Originally Programmed  Task tracker 4013

MODIFICATIONS:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                DATASTAGE               CODE                           DATE
DEVELOPER             DATE                PROJECT                     DESCRIPTION                                                                                      ENVIRONMENT          REVIEWER                 REVIEW
-----------------------------    ----------------------     ------------------------------        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  ------------------------------    ------------------------------       --------------------
Balkarn Gill               07/12/2013        5114                              Create Load File for EDW Table MKTNG_TERR_D                            EnterpriseWhseDevl  Peter Marshall              9/23/2013

Annotations:
Reference Code Mapping Data for Code SK lookups
Job Name: IdsEdwMktngTerrDExtr
Read from source table MKTNG_TERR and CD_MPPNG from IDS.  Apply Run Cycle filters when applicable to get just the needed rows forward
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys:
CD_MPPNG_SK
Write MKTNG_TERR_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwMktngTerrDLoad.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
